notes: Engine-native empirical replay executed on a strict Unreal-native manifest.
No synthetic fallback is available in this mode.
Any missing required Unreal-native buffer is a hard failure.
ROI is defined as pixels where baseline error exceeds 15% of local contrast. The mask is computed once from the baseline and held fixed across all methods. DSFB does not influence ROI selection.
This checked-in manifest provides 5 real Unreal-native captures; aggregation is emitted in aggregation_summary.md.
